Update to Grafana 7.5.12

Release notes: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/next/release-notes/release-notes-7-5-12/

Update to 7.5.12 with moderate severity security fix ( https://grafana.com/blog/2021/12/10/grafana-8.3.2-and-7.5.12-released-with-moderate-severity-security-fix/ )

security/vuxml taken care of in bug #260358
